ground.what_this_is: This is the Chief of Staff's main Inbox dashboard, a triage hub showing three distinct lanes of work: live escalations awaiting your decision, already resolved items for audit, and a grouped 'batched' lane for items needing simultaneous handling.
ground.what_you_can_do: Scan the three lanes to see what is 'awaiting you,' click on any item to drill down into its full details, and use the bottom counter to gauge the total volume of live work requiring your immediate attention.

howto.how_to_change: The button UI is defined in the Inbox region (Inbox.tsx); the wire intent logic is handled by the RUN-run and WIRE-intent capabilities in the runtime suite.
howto.what: The primary action button on the Inbox dashboard that initiates a wire operation.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this button to trigger the system's 'wire' intent, which translates the current triage state into a live operational command.

howto.how_to_change: The control lives in the inbox region (Inbox.tsx); the force logic is defined in suite.py:inbox_lanes (specifically the force override path).
howto.what: The force control on the inbox dashboard.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this button to immediately escalate the current triage state to a forced resolution or override, bypassing standard review queues.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the inbox region (Inbox.tsx); the action logic is defined in runtime/suite.py:inbox_lanes.
howto.what: The run command on the inbox dashboard.
howto.what_you_can_do: Execute the current triage decision to advance the item through the system.

howto.how_to_change: The card is the visible organ in Inbox.tsx; the compilation logic is suite.py:coa (the decision-compiler); you decide on value, never the raw code fork.
howto.what: The decision card in the inbox's action lane, presenting a pre-triaged value-choice.
howto.what_you_can_do: Drill into the item to see its ground truth or open the build review; the system translates the raw technical decision into a Commander-altitude value choice (what it means, 2-3 options with trade-offs, and a recommendation).

howto.how_to_change: The review surfacing logic lives in the decision-to-implementation wire (guarded close + surface_review) within the inbox region.
howto.what: An individual review card displaying the summary and diff of a completed self-build.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the result summary and changed-files diff, then approve (resolve) the build to record your verdict without re-triggering the build.

dossier.represents: A specific build-result review card within the inbox lane

howto.how_to_change: The text and state are driven by the build-review region (runtime/suite.py:review_verdicts); changing the message requires a code update to that region.
howto.what: A status indicator showing a build's 'sentiment' node is ready for live deployment.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the confirmation that the build finished and the sentiment node is live; this element informs the operator that the system is ready to accept new inputs based on this build.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the build-review region (runtime/suite.py:review_verdicts); changing it is a code change there.
howto.what: A drill control on the build-review card.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to drill down into the ground-level details of the build result.

howto.how_to_change: The card's logic lives in the decision-compiler region (runtime/suite.py:coa); changing the 'keep' or 'widen' options is a value decision there, not a code fork.
howto.what: A decision card in the Chief of Staff's inbox lane indicating a retrieval chain returned a low-confidence top result.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to choose between keeping the current low-confidence result or widening the corpus to find a better match.

howto.how_to_change: The drill action is defined in the decision-compiler (suite.py:coa); the visible control is the drillable payload.
howto.what: A drill control on the Chief of Staff's decision card.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to drill down into the node and view the raw output.

dossier.represents: Drill control on the CoA card

howto.how_to_change: The button's presence and label are defined in the decision card template; the compilation logic itself lives in suite.py:coa.
howto.what: The primary action button on a decision card within the Chief of Staff's inbox lane.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this button to initiate the compilation of the raw technical decision into a Commander-altitude value choice (presenting 2-3 options with trade-offs and a recommendation).

dossier.represents: The compile trigger for a course-of-action
